related_to_vehicle_preference.gold_memory:

[April 20, 2025] At 6:00 PM, Carol drove the car and adjusted the mirrors. She set the left mirror height to 50.

related_to_vehicle_preference.gold_memory:

[March 20, 2025] At 8:00 AM, Carol drove alone to a meeting (no samples). She set the temperature to 23 degrees.
related_to_vehicle_preference.query: At 7:30 AM, Carol picked up Nicholas. She pointed to the blue box on the back seat and said: 'I'm running samples to the lab today.' Nicholas said: 'I'll adjust the AC for you.'

related_to_vehicle_preference.gold_memory:
[April 18, 2025] At 2:00 PM, Benjamin was driving Carol to an unfamiliar site. Benjamin said: 'I need more help finding this place.' He set navigation voice to detailed.
[March 12, 2025] At 8:00 AM, Carol was driving. She told the car: 'I want the navigation voice in simple mode. The detailed instructions distract me.'
related_to_vehicle_preference.query: At 8:30 AM, Carol was driving Nicholas to the hospital. Nicholas asked: 'Do you want me to set the destination?' Carol replied: 'Yes, but fix the voice settings first, Ben changed them last time.'

related_to_vehicle_preference.gold_memory:

[April 25, 2025] At 8:00 AM, Benjamin drove the car. He told Nicholas: 'I prefer my music much quieter, around 40.'
related_to_vehicle_preference.query: At 6:00 PM, Nicholas was parked and waiting for Carol. He decided to watch a lecture video. He told the car: 'Set volume to my preferred level.'

related_to_vehicle_preference.gold_memory:

related_to_vehicle_preference.query: At 1:30 PM, Carol got in the car. The dashboard showed the outside temperature was 34 degrees. She told the car: 'It's scorching out there, adjust the seat ventilation.'

related_to_vehicle_preference.gold_memory:

related_to_vehicle_preference.query: At 8:00 AM, Benjamin got in the driver's seat. He told the car: 'Restore my cushion angle.'

related_to_vehicle_preference.gold_memory:

related_to_vehicle_preference.gold_memory:

related_to_vehicle_preference.query: At 8:30 AM, Nicholas was driving. He told the car: 'Switch the map back to the view I like.'

related_to_vehicle_preference.gold_memory:
